message:
chore: add 23 task beads decomposing spec sections §10-§23

Add 23 new task beads that break down the remaining spec sections into
implementable work items. All are task type, no existing beads modified.

Query Pipeline & Planner (§10):
  - §10.1-10.3: Lexer, parser, AST node types
  - §10.4-10.8: Name resolution, planning, codegen, VDBE, coroutines

File Format & Storage (§11):
  - §11.1-11.6: DB header, B-tree layout, varint, cells, overflow,
    freelist, pointer map
  - §11.7-11.14: Record format, WAL header/frame, WAL-index,
    sqlite_master, encoding, rollback journal

SQL Surface (§12):
  - §12.1-12.4: Full DML syntax (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
  - §12.5-12.9: DDL (CREATE TABLE/INDEX/VIEW/TRIGGER + other)
  - §12.10-12.17: Transaction control, ATTACH, EXPLAIN, VACUUM,
    expressions, type affinity, time travel queries

Functions & Collation (§13):
  - §13.1-13.2: Core scalar + math functions
  - §13.3-13.6: Date/time, aggregates, window functions, COLLATE

Extensions (§14):
  - §14.1-14.3: JSON1, FTS5, FTS3/FTS4
  - §14.4-14.7: R*-Tree, session, ICU, miscellaneous

Exclusions & Encryption (§15):
  - Exclusions list + XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption specification

Implementation Phases (§16):
  - Phases 1-5 (bootstrap through persistence)
  - Phases 6-9 (MVCC through CLI/conformance/replication)

Testing & Verification (§17):
  - §17.1-17.4: Unit tests, property tests, lab runtime, traces
  - §17.5-17.9: E-process monitoring, fuzz, conformance, perf, isomorphism

Conflict Model (§18):
  - §18.1-18.4: Pairwise probability, birthday paradox, M2, AMS sketch
  - §18.5-18.8: B-tree hotspots, empirical validation, merge impact

Reference & Meta (§19-§23):
  - §19: C SQLite behavioral reference + key quirks
  - §20: Key reference files (C source, asupersync, docs)
  - §21: Risk register (R1-R8) + open questions (Q1-Q6)
  - §22: Verification gates (universal + phase-specific)
  - §23: Summary — the 7 pillars of FrankenSQLite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
